ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apiary_health" (
  "apiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apiary */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "starting_pop" INTEGER /* Starting population of the bee colonies */,
  "max_pop" INTEGER /* Maximum population reached */,
  "pop_lost" INTEGER /* Population lost */,
  "percent_lost" REAL /* Percentage of population lost */,
  "pop_gained" INTEGER /* Population gained */,
  "pop_renovated" INTEGER /* Population renovated */,
  "percent_renovated" INTEGER /* Percentage of population renovated */,
  "varroa_mites_id" INTEGER /* ID of the varroa mites factor */,
  "other_pests_id" INTEGER /* ID of other pests factor */,
  "diseases_id" INTEGER /* ID of diseases factor */,
  "pesticides_id" INTEGER /* ID of pesticides factor */,
  "other_factors_id" INTEGER /* ID of other factors affecting health */,
  "unknown_factors_id" INTEGER /* ID of unknown factors affecting health */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "apiary_name" TEXT /* Name of the apiary */,
  "apiary_location" TEXT /* Detailed location of the apiary */,
  "apiary_owner" TEXT /* Name of the apiary owner or manager */,
  "apiary_size" TEXT /* Size of the apiary (number of hives) */,
  "apiary_type" TEXT /* Type of apiary (e.g., hobby, commercial) */,
  "apiary_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the apiary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apiary_id", "quarter", "year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apiary_health_other_pests_id FOREIGN KEY ("other_pests_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apiary_health_varroa_mites_id FOREIGN KEY ("varroa_mites_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apiary_health_diseases_id FOREIGN KEY ("diseases_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apiary_health_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apiary_health_pesticides_id FOREIGN KEY ("pesticides_id") REFERENCES pesticides ("pesticide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Short code for the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "state_climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "is_varroa_mite" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the factor is specifically about varroa mites */,
  "is_pest" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the factor is a pest */,
  "is_disease" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the factor is a disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "is_fungal" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the disease is fungal */,
  "is_bacterial" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the disease is bacterial */,
  "is_viral" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the disease is viral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pesticides" (
  "pesticide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pesticide */,
  "pesticide_name" TEXT /* Name of the pesticide */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pesticide */,
  "pesticide_type" TEXT /* Type of pesticide */,
  "pesticide_effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the pesticide in controlling pests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pesticide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apiary_factors" (
  "apiary_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apiary factor record */,
  "apiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the apiary */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the factor */,
  "prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the factor */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apiary_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apiary_factors_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apiary_factors_apiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("apiary_id") REFERENCES apiary_health ("apiary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apiary_diseases" (
  "apiary_disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apiary disease record */,
  "apiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the apiary */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the disease */,
  "prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the disease */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apiary_disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apiary_diseases_apiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("apiary_id") REFERENCES apiary_health ("apiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apiary_diseases_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apiary_pesticides" (
  "apiary_pesticide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apiary pesticide record */,
  "apiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the apiary */,
  "pesticide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the pesticide */,
  "amount_used" REAL /* Amount of pesticide used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the pesticide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apiary_pesticide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apiary_pesticides_pesticide_id FOREIGN KEY ("pesticide_id") REFERENCES pesticides ("pesticide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apiary_pesticides_apiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("apiary_id") REFERENCES apiary_health ("apiary_id")
)
